hook: Stop writing nested if checks for null
code_skeleton:
const city = user?.address?.city ?? 'Unknown';
// No more 'Cannot read property of undefined'

hook: Wait for ALL promises even if some fail

code_skeleton:
const arr = ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd'];

arr.at(-1);  // 'd'
arr.at(-2);  // 'c'
arr.at(0);   // 'a'

hook: When to use Map instead of plain objects
Partial, Pick, Omit — stop rewriting interfaces
Group array items by key — built-in!
Reference objects without preventing garbage collection
Make any object iterable with for...of
Chain errors with context in ES2022
Find from the end without reversing
